channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Market Analysis: Key Stocks and Strategic Insights
item.description: The Wall Street Journal's live coverage highlights critical developments in the stock market, focusing on strategic investments and corporate performance. Intel and EasyJet are among the key companies...

item.title: Chinua Achebe's 'Things Fall Apart' and the Complexity of African Identity
item.description: The article reflects on re-reading Chinua Achebe's seminal novel 'Things Fall Apart,' highlighting its enduring relevance in understanding African history and identity. The author contrasts their init...

item.title: Federal Public Servants to Work 4 Days a Week Starting July 2026
item.description: The Canadian federal government has implemented a new policy requiring public servants to work four days a week, effective July 2026. This change aims to reduce operational costs, improve work-life ba...

item.title: Matlala's Testimony Postponed in Madlanga Commission Inquiry
item.description: Alleged criminal cartel member Vusimusi 'Cat' Matlala will not appear in person at the Madlanga commission of inquiry on Tuesday, July 6, 2026, as his testimony has been postponed. His legal represent...

item.title: Concerns Over NYSC Reforms and Their Impact on National Security
item.description: The deputy spokesperson for the House of Representatives, Philip Agbese, has called on President Bola Tinubu to suspend proposed reforms to the National Youth Service Corps (NYSC), warning that change...

item.title: Trump's Financial Practices and Lack of Accountability
item.description: The article critiques Donald Trump's financial practices, drawing parallels between his past casino failures and his current situation in the White House. It highlights how Trump's history of bankrupt...

item.title: NSW mother charged with murder after boy's body found in home
item.description: A 32-year-old woman has been charged with murder after the discovery of a four-year-old boy's body inside her NSW home. The incident, described as 'extremely confronting', has prompted an independent ...

item.title: School Bus Arrival Brings Hope to Baringo Community After Banditry Crisis
item.description: Residents of Yatia village in Baringo North celebrated the arrival of the area's first-ever school bus, donated to Yatia Mixed Secondary School, marking a renewed sense of hope for the banditry-prone ...

item.title: Gavin Newsom's Wealth Tax Proposal Faces Economic Concerns
item.description: The article critiques Governor Gavin Newsom's recent shift in stance on wealth taxes, highlighting his initial opposition to a California ballot measure imposing a one-time 5% tax on billionaires and ...

item.title: US Drops Adani Fraud Charges Over Diplomatic Concerns
item.description: The United States Department of Justice has decided to drop fraud charges against Gautam Adani, the chairman of the Adani Group, citing potential diplomatic tensions and resource allocation priorities...

item.title: Two Adults Rescued from Montreal's Lachine Canal After Nighttime Incident
item.description: Two young adults were rescued from Montreal’s Lachine Canal after being submerged for an unspecified duration. Emergency responders, including the fire department and Canadian Coast Guard, used sonar ...

item.title: Fatal Road Crash in Ogun Leaves 10 Dead
item.description: A fatal road traffic crash occurred on Sunday night at Saapade Bridge along the Ibadan–Lagos Expressway, involving a white Sinotruk truck and a white Toyota Hiace bus. The incident resulted in 10 fata...

item.title: Pizza Express investigates Prince Andrew's claim of visiting Woking restaurant during Newsnight interview
item.description: The article details how Pizza Express conducted an internal inquiry into Prince Andrew Mountbatten-Windsor's claim that he visited its Woking branch during his 2019 Newsnight interview. The former pri...

item.title: Claire Castro Criticizes Robin Padilla Over Remarks on Thin-Skinnedness and Canada Harassment
item.description: Palace Press Officer Undersecretary Claire Castro criticized Senator Robin Padilla for his remarks suggesting government officials should not be thin-skinned, following her allegations of harassment d...

item.title: Exploring Art, Culture, and Nature: A Weekly Roundup
item.description: The article highlights a curated selection of creative and cultural content from the week of June 28 to July 5, 2026. It features a series of surreal photographs capturing light sculptures across the ...

item.title: Tanzania Government Enhances Support for Cooperatives to Boost Economic Growth
item.description: The Tanzanian government has reaffirmed its commitment to strengthening the cooperative sector as a strategic pillar for economic transformation. Deputy Permanent Secretary Professor Peter Msofe highl...

item.title: Neymar hints at Brazil retirement after World Cup exit
item.description: Brazilian footballer Neymar Jr. hinted at the end of his international career after Brazil's unexpected World Cup defeat to Norway in the round of 16. The 34-year-old scored in the 2-1 loss, which end...

item.title: Visitors Weigh Costs and Benefits of Attending Calgary Stampede Amid High Expenses
item.description: The Calgary Stampede, a major annual event in Canada, is drawing visitors who are carefully balancing their spending against the high costs associated with attending. Despite the event’s popularity, m...

item.title: Mumbai faces severe monsoon crisis with multiple casualties and infrastructure disruptions
item.description: Mumbai and surrounding regions are grappling with a severe monsoon crisis that has resulted in at least 13 fatalities and widespread disruptions. Heavy rainfall triggered landslides on the Mumbai-Pune...

item.title: Bien Makes History at Afro Nation Portugal with Kenyan Celebrities in Attendance
item.description: Kenyan artiste Bien-Aimé Baraza made history by becoming the first Kenyan solo performer at Afro Nation Portugal, delivering a groundbreaking Afro-pop set that captivated a global audience. The event,...
